rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"buildTargets validation only checks for Array type, not that elements are strings — {buildTargets: [42]} would pass validation","scope":"src/utils/configValidator.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Use Result<T, E> type from src/utils/result.ts for fallible operations instead of throwing","scope":"src/utils"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Vitest tests are co-located next to source files using .test.ts suffix (e.g., retry.test.ts, result.test.ts)","scope":"testing"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"TypeScript type errors are caught at build step, not just at runtime — validating element types of arrays is a distinct concern from array type itself","scope":"src/utils/configValidator.ts"}]}
